---
title: "Provenance"
subtitle: "Where MLSysВ·im numbers come from and how to audit them"
---

Every **Tier A** number in MLSysВ·im вЂ” registry entries and appendix-facing scalars вЂ” carries
structured lineage via the `Provenance` model. BibTeX citations stay in the textbook; the
package stores audit metadata only.

::: {.callout-note}
## There is no `mlsysim.core.defaults`
Constants were reorganized into domain registries (`Literature`, `Systems`, `Infrastructure`,
`Ops`, `core.calibration`). See the [Zoo overview](zoo/index.qmd) and
[DATA_MODEL.md](DATA_MODEL.md).
:::

## Where constants live

| Namespace | Examples |
|:----------|:---------|
| **`Hardware.*`** | Peak FLOPs, HBM bandwidth, TDP вЂ” datasheet truth |
| **`Literature.*`** | MFU bands, Chinchilla ratio, scaling О·, overheads |
| **`Infrastructure.Grids` / `Pricing` / `Capacity`** | Carbon, PUE, cloud \$ anchors |
| **`Systems.Reliability` / `Fabrics` / `Clusters`** | MTTF, fabrics, fleet tiers |
| **`Ops.Monitoring`** | PSI thresholds, KS coefficient |
| **`core.calibration`** | Solver/engine default kwargs вЂ” **not** cited in appendix tables |

Do **not** duplicate registry fields across namespaces (chip `unit_cost` lives on
`Hardware.Cloud.*` only).

## Registry entries

Hardware and model zoo entries attach provenance via `metadata.provenance`:

```python
import mlsysim

hw = mlsysim.Hardware.Cloud.H100
prov = hw.metadata.provenance
print(prov.kind, prov.ref)
```

## Literature scalars

Appendix-facing numbers use the `Sourced` type and `sourced()` factory:

```python
mfu = mlsysim.Literature.Training.MfuHigh
print(mfu, mfu.provenance.ref)
```

Browse the full catalog in the [Literature Zoo](zoo/literature.qmd).

## Audit gates

Contributors should run before opening a PR:

```bash
python -m mlsysim.tools.audit_provenance --scope all --strict
```

Textbook-only gate:

```bash
python -m mlsysim.tools.audit_provenance --scope textbook --strict
```

| Gate | What it catches |
|:-----|:----------------|
| Registry metadata | Hardware/model nodes without `metadata.provenance` |
| Sourced scalars | `Literature.*`, `Infrastructure.Capacity.*`, `core.calibration.*` without lineage |
| Appendix lineage | Stale paths or missing provenance in assumption appendices |

Full contributor rules: [Contributing вЂ” Provenance](contributing.qmd#provenance-rules).

## Canonical Python paths

Use **nested registry paths** in Python (`Hardware.Cloud.H100`, `Models.Language.Llama3_8B`).
The CLI accepts short names (`mlsysim eval Llama3_8B H100`) via internal lookup вЂ” that
convenience does not apply to `import mlsysim` code.

See [API Stability](api-stability.md#registry-paths).
